---
title: <short, human-readable title>
id: <unique_prompt_id>
author: brad_cannell
date: yyyy-mm-dd
date-modified: yyyy-mm-dd
audience: <academic | student | developer | clinician>
interface: api
domain: <e.g., epidemiology | data_science | general>
tags:
  - tag
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  eval: false
---

# Overview

Conversation about...

---

# Prerequisites

See [Working with Python and Chatlas](https://brad-cannell.github.io/my-ai-assistant/vignettes/python-and-chatlas.html) for setup instructions (virtual environment, package installation, API key management).

# Load Packages

```{python}
from chatlas import ChatAnthropic, ChatOpenAI
from datetime import date
from pathlib import Path
import keyring
import os
```

# File Paths and Environment Variables

```{python}
# OpenAI Models:    https://platform.openai.com/docs/models
# Anthropic Models: https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/about-claude/models/overview
# model = "gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17"
# model = "claude-sonnet-4-6"

# Today's date
today = date.today().isoformat()

# Get the current working directory
cwd = Path.cwd()

# Conversation folder path for artifacts
conversation_folder_path = cwd / Path("path_to_folder")
```

# Expose API

See [Storing API Keys with Keyring](https://brad-cannell.github.io/my-ai-assistant/vignettes/keyring.html) for first-time setup instructions.

```{python}
# OpenAI
openai_api = keyring.get_password("bradGPT", "brad")
if openai_api is not None:
    os.environ['OPENAI_API_KEY'] = openai_api
    print("OPENAI_API_KEY set.")
else:
    print("Could not retrieve OpenAI key from keyring.")
```

```{python}
# Claude
claude_api = keyring.get_password("claude-my-ai-assistant", "brad")
if claude_api is not None:
    os.environ['ANTHROPIC_API_KEY'] = claude_api
    print("ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set.")
else:
    print("Could not retrieve Anthropic key from keyring.")
```

# Create Chat Object

## OpenAI

```{python}
chat = ChatOpenAI(model=model)
```

## Claude

```{python}
chat = ChatAnthropic(model=model)
```

# Conversation

```{python}
chat.chat("Your message here.", echo='none')
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
print(chat)
```

# Save Chat History

See [Save Chat History](https://brad-cannell.github.io/my-ai-assistant/vignettes/python-and-chatlas.html#save-chat-history) in the Python and Chatlas vignette for full options, including JSON export, condensing, and reloading history.

```{python}
chat_history_path_md = conversation_folder_path / ("chat_history_" + today + ".md")
chat.export(chat_history_path_md, overwrite=True)
```

# Render to HTML

Click the **Preview** button in Positron, or run in the terminal:

```bash
quarto render "path/to/conversation.qmd"
```
